transcript.text: Give me just a couple of minutes.
I've just slacked them.
I'm just waiting for an update from their site.
I'm waiting of
Actually, Andrew is sick right now and you wanted to reach your cancer today's call.
Sorry, can you repeat it?
Yeah, he's actually out sick.
So you want the call to be scheduled.
Not sure.
Safety notification.
No, I didn't have it.
Do you have?
Do he send you over any updates or points to talk about the first?
Yeah, I know you guys were on break as well, but I saw that a lot of posts were scheduled and posted.

In the meantime, but I'm not sure if he separated any talking points to you Like I wasn't able so since we were all the on the eggs and then we just reconnected this week and We have been working across taking updates from for the last three weeks.

We have been taking updates all the respective projects um Can you check with him if he thinks we'll be able to participate on the results meeting tomorrow I think that's more relevant than the checkpoint today since we don't since we were on break and you were on break as well So what we'll do is we'll bump up this conversation in our slack panel and we'll check it If not him if anyone else can fill up his face that also would work, right?
Just give me, let's bump up this conversation in a common Slack channel, let's raise it up there and just let's find out on how do we proceed ahead.
Does that work?
Yeah, sure.

That we, if we don't have anything else to discuss today, but it would be important for us to have that meeting tomorrow, if Andrei can join, then maybe Jimmy or Marcel, because we discussed to you that we needed to see those results at the end of last year, and we pushed the meeting to this year because of our agenda and such.
So for us, would be very important to finish the week with this meeting and the results in our hands.
Got it, makes sense.
I'm very important from this meeting to them.
And let's do this conversation in the common Slack channel, where what happens is we can tag them and then we can take it from there and we will try to.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss updates and reschedule the results meeting due to unexpected absence.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Andrew (likely a key team member) is out sick, impacting today's planned discussion](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Results meeting scheduled for tomorrow is crucial for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Need to confirm attendance or find a replacement (e.g., Jimmy or Marcel) for tomorrow's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Updates from the past three weeks need to be addressed, despite holiday breaks](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Topics

### Team Availability and Meeting Rescheduling

  - [Andrew unexpectedly out sick, affecting today's planned discussion](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Prateek initially unsure if call should be rescheduled](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [Paola emphasizes importance of tomorrow's results meeting (previously postponed from year-end)](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Agreement to move conversation to common Slack channel for wider team input](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Project Updates and Continuity

  - [Despite break periods, social media posts were scheduled and published](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Teams have been collecting updates on respective projects over past three weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Paola seeks confirmation on whether updates or talking points were prepared by Andrew](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)

### Critical Results Meeting (Tomorrow)

  - [GrowthX team views tomorrow's meeting as vital for receiving project results](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Originally scheduled for end of last year, postponed due to agenda conflicts](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Paola stresses need to "finish the week with this meeting and the results in our hands"](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Suggestion to involve Jimmy or Marcel if Andrew cannot attend](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Escalate discussion to common Slack channel, tagging relevant team members](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Confirm Andrew's availability for tomorrow's results meeting](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [If Andrew unavailable, explore having Jimmy or Marcel step in](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Ensure all necessary results and updates are prepared for tomorrow's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Follow up on any outstanding updates from the three-week break period](https://fathom.video/share/xS_oAopNmqqCPGkxBssiFnvyvp1mqP4p?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

action_items.description: Raise issue in common Slack channel re: tomorrow's results meeting. Tag team. Confirm attendee (Andrei/Jimmy/Marcel). Ensure meeting happens.
